mapper.select: SELECT id, code, type, title, description, status, priority, provider_id, external_work_item_id, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, project_context_id, project_space_id, project_iteration_id, owner_user_id, assignee_user_id, current_workflow_instance_id, extra_json, version, created_at, updated_at FROM work_item ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT id, code, type, title, description, status, priority, provider_id, external_work_item_id, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, project_context_id, project_space_id, project_iteration_id, owner_user_id, assignee_user_id, current_workflow_instance_id, extra_json, version, created_at, updated_at FROM work_item WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, code, type, title, description, status, priority, provider_id, external_work_item_id, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, project_context_id, project_space_id, project_iteration_id, owner_user_id, assignee_user_id, current_workflow_instance_id, extra_json, version, created_at, updated_at FROM work_item WHERE code = #{code}

SELECT id, code, type, title, description, status, priority, provider_id, external_work_item_id, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, project_context_id, project_space_id, project_iteration_id, owner_user_id, assignee_user_id, current_workflow_instance_id, extra_json, version, created_at, updated_at FROM work_item WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND external_work_item_id = #{externalWorkItemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_item (id, code, type, title, description, status, priority, provider_id, external_work_item_id, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, project_context_id, project_space_id, project_iteration_id, owner_user_id, assignee_user_id, current_workflow_instance_id, extra_json, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{code}, #{type}, #{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{providerId}, #{externalWorkItemId}, #{projectId}, #{spaceId}, #{iterationId}, #{projectContextId}, #{projectSpaceId}, #{projectIterationId}, #{ownerUserId}, #{assigneeUserId}, #{currentWorkflowInstanceId}, #{extraJson}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE work_item SET code = #{code}, type = #{type}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, provider_id = #{providerId}, external_work_item_id = #{externalWorkItemId}, project_id = #{projectId}, space_id = #{spaceId}, iteration_id = #{iterationId}, project_context_id = #{projectContextId}, project_space_id = #{projectSpaceId}, project_iteration_id = #{projectIterationId}, assignee_user_id = #{assigneeUserId}, extra_json = #{extraJson}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
